mapper.select: SELECT d.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.subject_name SEPARATOR '、') FROM subject s WHERE s.department_id = d.department_id) AS subject_names, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher t WHERE t.department_id = d.department_id) AS teacher_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c WHERE c.department_id = d.department_id) AS class_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c2.student_count), 0) FROM class c2 WHERE c2.department_id = d.department_id) AS student_count FROM department d WHERE d.department_id = #{departmentId}

SELECT d.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.subject_name SEPARATOR '、') FROM subject s WHERE s.department_id = d.department_id) AS subject_names, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher t WHERE t.department_id = d.department_id) AS teacher_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c WHERE c.department_id = d.department_id) AS class_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c2.student_count), 0) FROM class c2 WHERE c2.department_id = d.department_id) AS student_count FROM department d ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.subject_name SEPARATOR '、') FROM subject s WHERE s.department_id = d.department_id) AS subject_names, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher t WHERE t.department_id = d.department_id) AS teacher_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c WHERE c.department_id = d.department_id) AS class_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c2.student_count), 0) FROM class c2 WHERE c2.department_id = d.department_id) AS student_count FROM department d
AND (d.department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.department_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (department_name, department_code, description) VALUES (#{departmentName}, #{departmentCode}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM department WHERE department_code = #{departmentCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT d.department_name, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.teacher_id), 0) AS teacher_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT c.class_id), 0) AS class_count, COALESCE(SUM(c.student_count), 0) AS student_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT e.exam_id), 0) AS exam_count FROM department d LEFT JOIN teacher t ON d.department_id = t.department_id LEFT JOIN class c ON d.department_id = c.department_id LEFT JOIN exam e ON c.class_id = e.class_id GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name ORDER BY d.department_name
